article.title: Uber L4 - Offer Accepted
article.content:
```
Education: CS from IIT
Years of Experience: 4
Prior experience: SDE at MNC
Prior compensation: ~62 LPA
Date of offer: August 2025
Company: Uber
Title: L4 (SDE-2 Backend)
Location: Hyderabad, India
Base + PF: 52 LPA
Annual bonus:7 LPA (Variable can go upto 2x based on Perf.)
Joining Bonus: 6 LPA
Stocks: 83.5K USD over 4 years (vested monthly)
Total first year comp: (Base + Bonus + Stocks + Joining Bonus) ~83 LPA
Benefits: Standard Uber benefits
(~70K per year for wellness + 50$ per month for Internet, Electricity bill,
4k INR worth Uber coupons etc.)
```

post.content: Interview experience pls I have interviews scheduled
Thanks for sharing! Was this the initial offer? Did you have any counter offers?
Congrats man!!\n\nPS:- Can you tell a bit about your projects? and what to keep in mind while preparing for campus placements.
